headline: OpenAI releases strongest models yet, addresses Codex token consumption issue
body: OpenAI launched new high-performance models this week while simultaneously resolving a Codex token burn issue that caused faster-than-expected credit depletion. The token consumption problem has been patched. For healthcare AI, stronger foundational models improve clinical documentation automation and coding accuracy in EHR systems, while stable API consumption becomes critical for budgeting in value-based care deployments where cost predictability directly impacts ROI. Healthcare vendors relying on OpenAI APIs for clinical workflows need to validate token usage under the new models to ensure their margin assumptions remain intact.
